summary: Operators of the Russian "Rubikon" Center reported 103 targets destroyed on March 4, 2026, including strikes on Ukrainian personnel, FPV air defense against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, and the destruction of a 2S1 "Gvozdika" self-propelled artillery system in the Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions. On March 5, they reported 128 targets destroyed, including a 2S22 "Bogdan" self-propelled artillery system, an M109, and a T-64BV tank. A Ukrainian FPV drone nearly struck a Russian Mi-8 helicopter, and analysts noted the use of a Chinese PTS-303 rotating antenna system (3-5 thousand hryvnias) for electronic warfare against FPV drones, as well as plastic mesh-based antenna concealment by Russian forces.
